2605.06177.title: BioMedArena: An Open-source Toolkit for Building and Evaluating Biomedical Deep Research Agents
2605.06177.paper_summary: Building a deep research agent today is an exercise in glue code: the same backbone evaluated on the same benchmark can report different accuracies in different papers because harness and tool registry all differ, and integrating a new foundation model into a comparable evaluation surface costs weeks of model-specific engineering. We call this the per-paper engineering tax and release BioMedArena, an open-source toolkit that not only alleviates it but also provides an arena for fair comparison of different foundation models when evaluating them as deep-research agents. BioMedArena decouples six layers of biomedical agent evaluation -- benchmark loading, tool exposure, tool selection, execution mode, context management, and scoring -- and exposes 147 biomedical benchmarks and 75 biomedical tools across 9 functional families. Adding a new model, benchmark, or tool reduces to registering a few-line provider adapter. We further provide 6 agent harnesses with 6 context-management strategies, which provide 12 backbones with competitive research capabilities and significantly improved performance, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on 8 representative biomedical benchmarks, with an average lift of +15.03 percentage points over prior SOTA. The toolkit, configurations, and per-task traces are available at https://github.com/AI-in-Health/BioMedArena
2605.06177.paper_summary_zh: 今天建立一個深度研究代理是一項粘合碼的練習：在相同基準上評估的相同骨幹在不同的論文中可能報告不同的準確度，因為工具和工具註冊各不相同，將新的基礎模型整合到可比較的評估表面需要數週的模型特定工程。我們稱這為每篇論文的工程稅，並推出 BioMedArena，一個開源工具包，不僅緩解了這一問題，還提供了一個公平比較不同基礎模型的場域，當將它們評估為深度研究代理時。BioMedArena 解耦了六層生物醫學代理評估——基準加載、工具曝光、工具選擇、執行模式、上下文管理和評分——並在 9 個功能類別中暴露了 147 個生物醫學基準和 75 個生物醫學工具。添加新的模型、基準或工具僅需註冊幾行提供者適配器。我們還提供了 6 個代理工具和 6 種上下文管理策略，這些策略提供了 12 個具有競爭研究能力的骨幹，並顯著提高了性能，在 8 個代表性的生物醫學基準上達到了最先進的（SOTA）結果，平均提升了 +15.03 個百分點，相較於之前的 SOTA。該工具包、配置和每個任務的追蹤可在 https://github.com/AI-in-Health/BioMedArena 獲得。
2605.06177.author: Jinge Wu et.al.
2605.06177.authors: Jinge Wu, Hongjian Zhou, Mingde Zeng, Jiayuan Zhu, Junde Wu, Jiazhen Pan, Sean Wu, Honghan Wu, Fenglin Liu, David A. Clifton
